isolation.database: Supabase Cloud (shared, data user-isolated via RLS)

steps.expected: Account created and redirected to dashboard
steps.observed: Successfully created account and redirected to /dashboard

steps.expected: New plan page loads with chat interface
steps.observed: Page loaded with chat input field

steps.action: Send message: 'I'm at Santa Monica College transferring to UCLA for Computer Science'
steps.observed: Plan generated with semester grid displayed

steps.expected: Newly created plan appears in list
steps.observed: Plan 'Santa Monica College → UCLA Computer Science' listed on dashboard

steps.expected: Full plan with semester grid and chat history loads
steps.observed: Plan loaded with all data intact
Same plan data displayed after reload

steps.expected: Target school, major, and date visible
steps.observed: Plan shows 'Santa Monica College → UCLA Computer Science active Apr 11, 2026'

assertions.title: Multiple plans per user

steps.expected: Plan saved and appears on dashboard

steps.action: Create second plan (De Anza → UC Davis CS)
steps.observed: Chat interaction occurred but plan not appearing on dashboard
Only first plan listed; second plan did not persist

evidence.network: Auto-save may not have triggered for second plan

assertions.issues: Second plan (De Anza → UC Davis CS) was generated via chat but did not appear on dashboard. The auto-save functionality may have timing issues or may only save the first plan created in a session.

steps.action: Send edit request: 'Move MATH 7A to semester 2'

steps.observed: Plan reloaded; edit appears to have persisted

frictions.description: Browser session closed unexpectedly during second plan creation requiring session restart
frictions.resolution: Reopened browser and signed in with saved credentials

frictions.description: Chat input element occasionally times out when filling - requires retry
frictions.resolution: Added wait and retried the fill operation

blockers.description: Second plan (De Anza → UC Davis CS) did not persist to dashboard despite successful chat interaction and apparent completion. Auto-save may only trigger on first plan creation or have timing issues.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 20+ seconds after AI response, navigated to dashboard - only first plan visible. Tried creating second plan twice with same result.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed. VAL-PLAN-003, VAL-PLAN-004, VAL-PLAN-005, and VAL-PLAN-010 all passed successfully. VAL-PLAN-007 failed because only one plan persisted despite attempting to create two separate plans. The auto-save functionality works for the initial plan but appears to have issues with subsequent plans in the same session.
